---
title: "Affronting Reason"
description: "My first published article on intersex"
date: 2026-06-27
categories: [intersex]
---

Click the title to view the pdf.

Chase, C. [Affronting Reason](/files/affronting_reason.pdf). in Looking Queer: Image and identity in lesbian, bisexual, gay and transgendered communities (ed. Dawn Atkins) 209–235 (Haworth, Binghamton New York, 1998).
